title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Fyers South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Fyers South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers South Asia Partners in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers South Asia Partners:
Fyers South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
